---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who is it for — a specific persona from `docs/02_PRODUCT_BLUEPRINT.md` §5 (Ananya/student, Dr. Verma/researcher, Rahul/security engineer), or a new use case not yet covered?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature as concretely as you can. If it touches an existing spec'd component, reference the relevant `specs/*.md` file and note what would need to change.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other approaches? Why is this one preferred?

## Roadmap / Scope Check

Before submitting, please check:

- [ ] Is this already listed in `docs/20_FUTURE_ENHANCEMENTS.md`? If so, link it instead of duplicating.
- [ ] Does this fit within the current phase's scope (`docs/15_ROADMAP.md`), or is it more appropriately a v2.0/Future item?
- [ ] Does this require a new ADR (`docs/18_DECISION_LOG.md`) — i.e., does it involve a significant architectural trade-off?

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, or links to related discussions.
